ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor point */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Common name of the sensor point */,
  "volttron_point_name" TEXT /* Volttron specific point name for integration */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the sensor values */,
  "unit_details" TEXT /* Details about the units (e.g., ranges, descriptions) */,
  "writable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sensor value is writable */,
  "starting_value" REAL /* Initial value for the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the sensor value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_points_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the sensor is located */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of the sensor's location */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the sensor's location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specific area */,
  "building_address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone categorization of the location (e.g., office, conference, storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded data */,
  "value" REAL /* Recorded value from the sensor */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES sensor_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control setting */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific writable sensor point */,
  "setpoint_value" REAL /* Setpoint value for the sensor */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting becomes effective */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who set the control setting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_settings_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES sensor_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor point triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert generated (e.g., high temperature) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES sensor_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login to the BMS */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor point */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view the sensor data */,
  "can_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can control the sensor settings */,
  "read_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has read-only access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES sensor_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor point */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES sensor_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., maintenance alert threshold) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., maintenance, data logging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., energy, HVAC, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
